What I do

From a messy spreadsheet to a story leadership can act on.

Dashboards & BI

Interactive reports in Power BI, Tableau and Excel — KPI cards, drill-downs, RLS and clean star-schema models that stay fast as the data grows.

Data Modeling & SQL

DAX measures, Power Query transforms and SQL queries that turn raw tables into a trustworthy single source of truth ready for analysis.

Analysis & Insight

Exploratory analysis with Python and statistics to find the why behind the numbers — then framed as plain-English recommendations.

Selected work

Featured projects

Three end-to-end builds across my core tools — each takes raw data through modeling and analysis to a dashboard a decision-maker can actually use. Click through to the full files on GitHub.

All repositories →
01 · Power BI
Power BI DAX RLS

Employee Attrition Analysis

An end-to-end HR analytics report on Kaggle workforce data — cleaning and modeling, DAX metrics, row-level security and publishing to the Power BI Service. It surfaced a 16.1% attrition rate, flagged sales reps as the highest-risk group, and showed attrition falling as tenure rises and concentrating in the lowest income band.

16.1%

Attrition rate

1,470

Employees analysed

9

Job roles

View on GitHub
Excel KPIs Power Query

KPI Performance Dashboard

An interactive project-portfolio dashboard built in Excel — tracking completion rates, budget utilization, earned value and cost performance, alongside team workload and at-risk projects. Twenty-plus KPIs are consolidated into one executive view so stakeholders can spot bottlenecks and decide fast.

$1.69M

Budget tracked

100

Projects

Task completion

View on GitHub
02 · Excel
03 · Tableau
Tableau Procurement SLA

Procurement Performance Overview

A Tableau workbook analysing procurement KPIs across suppliers, spend categories and SLA benchmarks. Waterfall, rolling-average and lead-time views reveal where spend concentrates, how reliable delivery is, and which categories need tighter sourcing — turning a raw PO log into a sourcing strategy.

$46.3M

About me

Hello, I'm Anika.

Data Analyst · BI Developer
Statistics, University of Dhaka

I'm a Statistics graduate from the University of Dhaka and a Data Analyst with 2+ years of experience in data analysis, reporting, and business intelligence. I've worked with clients across diverse industries, turning complex data into actionable insights and data-driven strategies.

My focus is data cleaning, data modeling, and dashboard development — helping teams make confident decisions through accurate data, clear trends, and insights presented in an impactful way.

Tools & skills

Power BI DAX Power Query Tableau Excel SQL Python Data Modeling VBA Macros PowerPoint
